_comment: Expected parse output for test/fixtures/environments/the-webs-below.png. NOTE: 'name' is NOT extractable via OCR — Tesseract cannot read the large display-font title. Name will come from Reddit post title (fallback) or LLM parse. Only the LLM path reliably recovers 'The Webs Below'.
name: The Webs Below
description: a cave littered with oversized beasts and reeking of things far more nefarious...
impulses: crawling critters, deceptive flora, far off noises
